items.title: This third quarter has been about as start-and-stop as it can be. The good news for the Sparks: only 1 turnover. The bad news is there’s been 15 combined fouls and multiple reviews for a quarter that started roughly 30 minutes ago. All tied between the Sparks and Sun at 58-58.

items.title: When Tully Bevilaqua played in Portland, some WNBA teams were still fighting to survive.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
When Tully Bevilaqua played in Portland, some WNBA teams were still fighting to survive.

Now, as the league celebrates its 30th season and sells out arenas, the former Fire guard returns to a city once again embracing women's basketball.

www.fieldhousefiles.com/p/tully-bevi...

media.title: A return to Portland reminds Tully Bevilaqua just how far the WNBA has come
media.description: Bevilaqua has experienced nearly every era of the WNBA. The former Portland Fire guard and current Fever staff member reflects on the league's growth, sold-out arenas and a return to Portland.

items.title: Halftime: Sun 39, Sparks 36. Sparks led by as much as 6 in the first half. Sun finished on a 6-0 run to take the lead going into the break. 13 first-half turnovers for the Sparks have been a killer on this second night of a back-to-back. Four players have multiple.
